name: Boots to Business (B2B)
whatItProvides: The entrepreneurship track within the TAP ecosystem, offering an overview of business ownership, feasibility planning, and market validation.

name: Business Plan Basics
whatItProvides: Guided templates and worksheets for drafting business plans, financial projections, and operational models.

name: SBA Follow-On Training Courses
whatItProvides: Follow-up courses such as 'B2B Revenue Readiness' and 'B2B Market Research' available after completing the core course.

name: Veterans Business Outreach Centers (VBOCs)
whatItProvides: Local centers providing business counseling, mentoring, training, and referrals to capital/funding options for veteran-owned startups.

name: Boots to Business Virtual Workbook
whatItProvides: The full TAP entrepreneurship workbook covering opportunity recognition, market research, startup economics, legal considerations, planning, financing, and partner resources.

name: SBA Instructor Portal
whatItProvides: Direct portal endpoint for SBA instructor and facilitator resources used to support Boots to Business delivery and course administration.

name: Military Spouse Entrepreneurship Workbook
whatItProvides: A DOL-hosted SBA workbook focused on military spouse entrepreneurship, access to capital, no-cost training, local assistance, and VBOC connections.

name: VBOC Boots to Business Handout Packet
whatItProvides: A 17-page VBOC packet explaining Boots to Business, Boots to Business Reboot, business-planning workshops, mentoring, capital access, and contracting preparation.

name: VBOC Program Fact Sheet
whatItProvides: A quick reference on VBOC eligibility, top reasons to contact a VBOC, Boots to Business and Reboot services, counseling, training, and local coverage areas.

name: SCORE Mentor Methodology Handbook
whatItProvides: SCORE mentoring reference material shared through the SCORE Box workspace for mentor methodology and advisor workflow support.

name: SCORE Support Knowledge Base
whatItProvides: SCORE's support knowledge base with training, mentoring journey, webinar, volunteer, event, and help-center materials.
